calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jenni Harmon, for Samuel Spiegel, Personal Representative.

The court advises counsel of its tentative ruling, specifically, the intent to fix the request for extraordinary fees and to deny the request for direct distribution of $50,000 to the administrator. Counsel offers advocacy regarding the administrator's request for direct distribution. The court advises counsel of its position with regard to the preceding and reconfirms its tentative ruling.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-18-2022 Continued To May-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-18-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-15-2021 Continued To Jan-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Harmon appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

Ms. Harmon stated that she is not aware of anyone objecting, and that everyone agrees to the petition and approves it. The Court raised the issue of bond and stated that it is inclined to require a minimum bond of $20,000.00. Ms. Harmon stated that Mr. Spiegel is bondable. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Status on close of estate is set for December 15, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-12-2020 Continued To Sep-09-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
